channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting reveals when he will trigger his Labour leadership bid amid Andy Burnham by-election campaign
item.description: Wes Streeting reveals when he will trigger his Labour leadership bid amid Andy Burnham by-election campaign

item.title: The Telegraph: Streeting: We can’t risk years of inertia under Starmer – look what happened with Biden - The Telegraph
item.description: Streeting: We can’t risk years of inertia under Starmer – look what happened with Biden - The Telegraph

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK pitched single market for goods with EU in pursuit of deeper trade ties
item.description: UK pitched single market for goods with EU in pursuit of deeper trade ties

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: We have had a lurching politics of over-correction in both directions: government ministers are talking/thinking about how to reduce immigration further from net 170k when it is already heading towards zero and below ...
item.description: We have had a lurching politics of over-correction in both directions: government ministers are talking/thinking about how to reduce immigration further from net 170k when it is already heading towards zero and below ...

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: On Newsnight, fall in net migration was attributed "spectacular ... Shabana Mahmood at Home Office obviously making some real changes happen there" by Helen MacNamara, former dep Cabinet Secretary.
Net migration data...
item.description:
On Newsnight, fall in net migration was attributed "spectacular ... Shabana Mahmood at Home Office obviously making some real changes happen there" by Helen MacNamara, former dep Cabinet Secretary.
Net migration data...

item.title: The Times: Labour leadership contenders are veering left. It’s not the answer - The Times
item.description: Labour leadership contenders are veering left. It’s not the answer - The Times

item.title: The Telegraph: Miliband held secret talks with Streeting - The Telegraph
item.description: Miliband held secret talks with Streeting - The Telegraph

item.title: The Telegraph: Rayner warned about electoral fraud in April ... and did not act - The Telegraph
item.description: Rayner warned about electoral fraud in April ... and did not act - The Telegraph

item.title: The Guardian: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10 - The Guardian
item.description: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10 - The Guardian

item.title: ITVX: Burnham says backing him in by-election would be 'vote to change Labour' | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Burnham says backing him in by-election would be 'vote to change Labour' | ITV News - ITVX
